items.title: Solana confirms a bullish signal, which last sparked 100% SOL price gains
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent bullish signal for Solana could indicate potential price movements, impacting investor sentiment and liquidity in the SOL market.

items.title: ‘We need lasting clarity’ – Crypto industry pushes SEC to formalize DeFi broker guidance
items.whyYouShouldCare: The push for clearer DeFi broker guidance from the SEC could enhance regulatory certainty, potentially fostering greater institutional interest and usage of Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
items.whyYouShouldCare: The sentencing related to a major scam highlights ongoing regulatory scrutiny in the crypto space, which may affect overall market confidence and SOL's positioning.
